dominance_rules.weak_dominance: A weakly dominates B if A is not worse than B on any dimension by more than tolerance
dominance_rules.strict_dominance: A strictly dominates B if A weakly dominates B AND A is better than B on at least one dimension by more than tolerance
dominance_rules.exact_tie: A and B differ by <= tolerance on all dimensions

outputs.dominated_policy_count: integer count of policies strictly dominated
outputs.no_universal_winner_condition: Only reported if no single policy is Pareto-optimal across ALL mechanisms within the same contract/budget/learner

missing_metrics: Policies with missing metrics (zero opportunity, NOT_EVALUABLE) are excluded from dominance comparison but reported separately
forbidden: Declaring a single 'best' policy by weighted sum or rank aggregation
